arts.ttl: Richard Hughes truth clear as Liverpool ready for transfer attack after new contracts
arts.sum: In this week's Blood Red column, Paul Gorst looks at Mohamed Salah's new contract, the role of Richard Hughes and how the announcement will help Arne Slot reshape his Liverpool squad this summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot opens up on Mo Salah saga as Reds urged to make swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool fans enjoyed a positive day of news after talisman Mohamed Salah signed a new two-year deal at Anfield, handing a huge boost to the club ahead of their clash against West Ham this weekend

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister Real Madrid question as Liverpool change contract focus after Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and transfer rumours including those about Alexis Mac Allister, Ibrahima Konate and Real Madrid

arts.ttl: “Support his growth” | West Ham look to replace departing players with relegated bargain
arts.sum: West Ham prepare for big player to leave in the Summer by lining up an exciting replacement. Ollie Scarles is certainly still raw, but the potential he has is unbelievable. arts.ttl: “Nonsense” | West Ham deny rumours of manager fallout with star
arts.sum: West Ham deny rumours of training ground fallout. Clashes with the manager became a semi-common occurrence under Julen Lopetegui. Both Mohammed Kudus and Jean-Clair Todino fell out with the Spaniard, and both issues were made very well known. Unfortunately, rumours of a similar situation have recently emerged. arts.ttl: Liverpool face new contract problem as Ibrahima Konate decision nears
arts.sum: Liverpool have another three players who are close to entering the final 12 months of their current contract at Anfield

arts.ttl: Arne Slot drops hint on Liverpool's summer transfer plan after new Mohamed Salah deal
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has chosen to commit his future to Liverpool and Arne Slot believes his show of faith will aid their summer transfer business with individuals keen to play with him

arts.ttl: Every word Arne Slot said about new Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract after cameras stopped rolling
arts.sum: Arne Slot speaks at length about Mohamed Salah's new Liverpool contract from the embargoed section of his Friday press conference

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer sets task for Mohamed Salah after Liverpool star finally signs new deal
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah finally signed his new Liverpool deal on Friday morning to the delight of all supporters, and former Newcastle striker Alan Shearer has admitted the Egyptian could now break his long-held goal record

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Ola Aina reacts as Mohamed Salah 'turns down £500m Saudi move' to sign new contract
arts.sum: Salah has moved to end all speculation regarding his future by signing a new deal at Anfield until the summer of 2027
